features.name: Rage
features.description: At 4th level, you can enter a rage as a bonus action on your turn. When you do so, you gain the benefits of the Rage feature (see below).

features.name: Frenzy
features.description: Starting at 5th level, your speed increases by 10 feet while you aren't wearing heavy armor.

features.name: Relentless Rage
features.description: Starting at 11th level, your rage can keep you fighting despite grievous wounds.

features.name: Persistent Rage
features.description: Beginning at 15th level, your rage is so fierce that it ends early only if you fall unconscious or choose to end it.

features.name: Primal Champion
features.description: At 20th level, you embody the power of the wilds. Your Strength and Constitution scores increase by 4.
